seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Full-stack examples for shipping agents in real apps with streaming UI, subagents, thread history, and production persistence across JS frameworks; addresses the gap between local demos and production deployment.

seed_expert_discoveries.project: SmithDB Inverted Index for Agent Traces
seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Technical details on constructing and querying a full-text search index over durable data in object storage (with 50-100ms GET costs) for agent traces in LangSmith.
Proposal for chatbots to handle hard queries asynchronously (e.g., 'give me 15m' response) with options for quicker guesses, extending org-wide persistent agent paradigms to one-on-one use.
